title: US crackdown on top AI fuels open-source surge
description: The US government's shock moves to restrict access to top artificial intelligence systems from Anthropic and OpenAI have sparked growing interest in open-source models -- especially ones from China. Around the same time, China's Zhipu AI (also known as Z. ai) released GLM-5.2, an open model that performed nearly as well as top offerings from Anthropic and OpenAI on several benchmarks.

title: Thinking of investing in AI? Kevin O'Leary says these 2 opportunities stand out
description: He'd focus on two businesses he believes are poised to benefit as artificial intelligence becomes mainstream: helping small businesses adopt AI and building the infrastructure that powers it.

title: IMF expects world economy to grow a sluggish 3% this year, weighed down by Iran war but helped by AI
description: The International Monetary Fund on Wednesday modestly downgraded its outlook for the world economy this year, citing the energy shock caused by the Iran war. But the fallout from the conflict is being partially offset by booming investment in artificial intelligence and other technologies. The IMF now expects the global economy to expand by a sluggish 3% in 2026, down from 3.5% last year and from the 3.1% it had forecast for this year back in April. The war pushed up energy prices, squeezing businesses and consumers. The IMF now expects oil prices to be up nearly 32% this year and for overall global inflation to accelerate to 4.7% in 2026.
content: WASHINGTON (AP) — The International Monetary Fund on Wednesday modestly downgraded its outlook for the world economy this year, citing the energy shock caused by the Iran war. But the fallout from the conflict is being partially offset by booming inv... [285 chars]

title: Artificial intelligence won't eliminate jobs but will create new opportunities: Dr Kamran Shaukat
description: Dr Kamran Shaukat, a Senior Lecturer at Torrens University, says artificial intelligence (AI) is rapidly transforming the world of work. However, he believes AI is not only eliminating some jobs but also creating new employment opportunities. In this interview, he discusses the benefits, challenges and safe use of AI for everyday people.

title: Insilico Medicine Releases Positive Profit Alert for the First Half of 2026
description: CAMBRIDGE, Mass., July 9, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- Insilico Medicine ('Insilico' or the 'Company', HKEX: 3696), a generative artificial intelligence (AI)-driven clinical-stage biotech company, today delivered a positive profit alert for the six months ended June 30, 2026 ('First Half of 2026'). The strong financial performance was primarily propelled by sustained revenue growth alongside systematic improvements of operational efficiency.
